# ID-45: T7 — Phew full-corpus reingest via cocoindex (all content types)

Full Phew client corpus reingest — ALL content types (Q&A pairs, capability/methodology, sector intelligence, procurement content; markdown/PDF/DOCX/URL), not Q&A-only. Supersedes PLAN §4.7 Q&A-only framing per Liam S262 clarification. Stage complete corpus into cocoindex-tracked location, run canonical flow end-to-end, validate all content types into content_items + derived tables, promote Q&A extractions to q_a_pairs, soft-archive legacy content_items.content_type='q_a_pair' rows, cross-ref counts vs Phew inventory. Soft-dep ID-42 if any Phew content is HTML/URL-sourced (pullmd must land first).

_No subtasks._
